title: BridgeHarnessV1AuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain bridge-harness-mcp-client retrospective to record that the bridge-harness v1 (a Python agent-loop harness at clients/bridge-harness/ that drives a cheap orchestrator-tier model with escalation to a strong tier via the chain-15 escalation contract, loads the mcp-servers skills tree as its system prompt, dispatches MCP tools to toolkit-server, and persists per-session conversation state in SQLite) has been verified against the chain's completion-condition items (a)-(i). Same Findings array shape as ArchitectureAuditCompleted and the other *AuditCompleted events. Self-hosting check: the harness's own tool-dispatch + EscalationProposed telemetry lands through the same write-side ledger this closing audit lands through, exercised via go/cmd/bridge-harness-v1-audit-emit.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — clients/bridge-harness/ARCHITECTURE.md (T1 design) and the chain's completion_condition.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome — what landed, what was deferred, which downstream harness-swap work becomes forgeable now that the harness has shipped.

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase of work (e.g. wiring a live DeepSeek endpoint, or the chain-17/19 hook consumers). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per completion-condition item / audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, live-run result, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
